ink.$description: Ink — Primary text, all borders, logo forms, icon strokes — the structural near-black that defines every contour across the system

canvas.$description: Canvas — Page background — warm off-white that gives the entire system its gallery-wall warmth rather than clinical white

paper.$description: Paper — Card surfaces, article blocks, elevated panels — pure white sits on top of Canvas to create subtle layering without shadows

ash.$description: Ash — Hairline borders, divider lines, subtle structural rules — the thinnest visible grid

stone.$description: Stone — Secondary borders, muted fills, icon strokes at lower emphasis

linen.$description: Linen — Muted surface for category tags, soft chips, low-emphasis backgrounds — warm-tinted neutral that steps between Paper and Canvas

graphite.$description: Graphite — Muted body text, secondary copy — warm dark gray for hierarchy below Ink

mist.$description: Mist — Tertiary text, timestamps, metadata — the lightest readable gray

bronze.$description: Bronze — Sparingly used warm accent — appears as small punctuation dots or category indicators, never as fills; adds a whisper of warmth to the achromatic system

slate.$description: Slate — Secondary accent — cool counterpoint to Bronze, used in equally restrained dot/tag contexts to create subtle color rhythm

instrument-sans.$description: All UI, navigation, body copy, button labels, and small headlines. Weight 500 carries nav and button emphasis; weight 400 is the default reading voice. Free substitute: Inter, DM Sans.

instrument-serif.$description: All display and editorial headlines — the 52px and 74px sizes carry the brand's magazine-portfolio voice. The contrast between this high-contrast serif and the neutral sans is the system's signature typographic gesture. Free substitute: Playfair Display, Cormorant Garamond.

canvas.$description: Surface level 1: Base page background — the warm off-white gallery wall

paper.$description: Surface level 2: Card surfaces and article blocks that float above Canvas

linen.$description: Surface level 3: Soft chip and tag backgrounds — the most recessed surface
